scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @estore/web" "npm run dev --workspace @estore/api"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @estore/web && npm run build --workspace @estore/api
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @estore/web && npm run lint --workspace @estore/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @estore/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @estore/api
